title: Batch per-score summary generation for Scorecard History
description: Implement batched per-score LLM summary generation with strict merge/validation and tests for large scorecard windows.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented per-score summary batching with payload+count limits, strict merge validation, adaptive split retries for failed segments, and added backend tests for batching/failure scenarios. Verified Suco 14-day report now completes successfully.
